name: Spooky Dwellers 3
short_description: Join Tomassino, the skeleton writer, in a thrilling Match 3 quest to illuminate haunted boards and uncover their hidden secrets!
detailed_description:
Join Tomassino, a skeleton writer, on a thrilling adventure full of mystery! Explore haunted Match 3 boards as he unravels the secrets of a sorrowful family. Banish spooky creatures using magical light talismans, solve puzzles, enjoy fun minigames, and discover all the exciting features this game offers. Create a 3D Halloween-themed playground filled with spooky buildings and objects. You'll guide a group of eerie characters from a portal, helping them find homes in your playground. Will you and Tomassino succeed, or will the shadows win?

Features

150 Match 3 levels to conquer.

Create and customize your 3D Otherworldly Playground.

Lead Spooky Dwellers to lurk in houses in your Otherworldly Playground.

Hidden Objects and other minigames.

Collect trophies for more coins.

Wallpapers.

Extra stories.

Normal and Expert Match 3 modes.
